name: standalone-miner
description: XENTurbo XEN Miner - pure frontend batch miner, no backend, no database. All state derived from on-chain data.

scripts.format:check: prettier --check package.json package-lock.json README.md eslint.config.mjs vite.config.ts playwright.config.ts .github/workflows/*.yml scripts/*.{mjs,mts} src/components/{MintList,RpcSettings}.vue src/composables/{useDocumentClock,useGasPrice,usePendingTx,useRpcHealth}.ts src/config/chains.ts src/core/{chainReader,eip1193,idb,pendingOps,postconditions,rpc,txManager,types,wallet}.ts src/stores/{vmuStore,walletStore}.ts src/utils/{concurrency,format,rewards}.ts src/views/MinerView.vue tests/{chainReader,chainReaderBatches,concurrency,eip1193,idb,mintList,operationGate,pendingOps,postconditions,rewards,rpc,rpcSettings,txManager,useDocumentClock,useGasPrice,usePendingTx,verifyCreate2,vmuStore,wallet,walletStore,walletStoreSync}.test.ts tests/e2e/*.ts
scripts.verify: npm run check:public-safety && npm run lint && npm run format:check && npm run test:coverage && npm run typecheck && npm run build && npm run check:bundle && npm audit --omit=dev --audit-level=high --registry=https://registry.npmjs.org && playwright test
